subcodes.first_line: O thou who art the means of joy and gladness to the hearts of the friends of the All-Merciful! This service to which thou art devoted is, in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای واسطه سرور و بشارت قلوب دوستان رحمانی این خدمتی که به ان قائمی فی الحقیقه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for teaching, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
